snippet.title: The Cranberries - Zombie (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
The Cranberries - Zombie (Lyrics)

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Another head hangs lowly
Child is slowly taken
And the violence caused such silence
Who are we, mistaken?

[Pre-Chorus]
But you see, it's not me, it's not my family
In your head, in your head, they are fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are cryin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie, oh

[Post-Chorus]
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo
Doo, doo, doo, doo

[Verse 2]
Another mother's breakin'
Heart is takin' over
When the violence causes silence
We must be mistaken

[Pre-Chorus]
It's the same old theme, since 1916
In your head, in your head, they're still fightin'
With their tanks and their bombs and their bombs and their guns
In your head, in your head, they are dyin'

[Chorus]
In your head, in your head
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie
What's in your head, in your head?
Zombie, zombie, zombie-ie-ie-ie
Oh-oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh, eh-eh-oh, ya-ya

[Instrumental Outro]

snippet.title: Rata Blanca - Mujer Amante (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
“Mujer Amante” es una de las baladas más icónicas de Rata Blanca y una canción fundamental del heavy metal argentino. Con una combinación inolvidable de virtuosismo, emoción y potencia, el tema se convirtió en un clásico que marcó generaciones dentro del rock en español.

Escuchá y cantá “Mujer Amante” reviviendo una de las canciones más emblemáticas del rock nacional argentino.

#RataBlanca #MujerAmante #RockNacional

snippet.title: can’t be blue “can’t love” (Feat. HAN (Stray Kids)) M/V
snippet.description:
can’t be blue “can’t love” (Feat. HAN (Stray Kids)) M/V out now

〈can’t love〉는 전에 받았던 상처로 인해 더 이상 사랑할 수 없다는 사실 앞에서 스스로를 놓아버린 상황에 관한 곡이다. 담담한 어조 속에 남아 있는 미련과, 목 끝에서 삼켜진 말들처럼 전해지지 못한 감정들이 곡 전반을 감싼다. 사랑을 원하지만 사랑할 수 없는 아이러니, 그 모순된 마음을 차갑고 솔직하게 그려낸 노래.
